data.title: Verizon Q3 Earnings: Wireless Subs Boost with 5G Offers, $1.7B Severance Charge Hit To Profit, Reiterates Annual Outlook
data.description: Verizon stock traded lower on Tuesday after reporting Q3 results, with sales down year over year and missing analyst estimates. EPS beat expectations.

data.title: How Much Money Does It Take To Feel Rich In 2024? Benzinga Poll Reveals The Millionaire Sweet Spot
data.description: A Benzinga reader poll asks how much money you need to be considered rich in 2024. A look at the results and what they mean for retirement.

data.title: This Walmart Analyst Begins Coverage On A Bullish Note; Here Are Top 5 Initiations For Tuesday
Enphase Energy: Solar Stock Stuck In The Dark Hopes Earnings Spark A Turnaround
data.description: Enphase Energy is gearing up to report its third-quarter earnings after the market closes on Tuesday. Wall Street expects 77 cents per share.

data.title: Ark Invest's Brett Winton Explains Why Betting Markets Favor Trump Over Kamala Harris, While Polls Show Otherwise
data.description: Winton highlighted that prediction markets have often diverged from polls-based approaches, with a significant portion of these deviations favoring Democratic odds.
